data.title: Iranian Military Advisor Killed in U.S.-Israel Joint Attack
data.description: An Iranian military advisor, Jamshid Ehaki, was killed in a joint attack by the United States and Israel. According to PANews, the incident was reported by Xinhua News Agency on March 31. The attack highlights ongoing tensions in the region, with implications for international relations and security dynamics.

data.title: Trump Claims Victory Announcement Imminent
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump stated on March 31 that a victory announcement is imminent. According to BlockBeats, he also remarked that removing Iran's uranium mines would be 'very difficult.'

data.title: U.S. Defense Secretary Hegseth Discusses Options for Hormuz Strait
data.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Hegseth stated on March 31 that alternative options are available if the Hormuz Strait remains closed. According to BlockBeats, he emphasized that the world should be prepared for an escalation regarding the situation in the Hormuz Strait.

data.title: The Better Money Company Secures $10 Million Seed Funding for Stablecoin Clearinghouse
data.description:
Former a16z crypto investor Sam Broner has announced the establishment of The Better Money Company with university friend Adam Zuckerman. According to Odaily, the company has successfully completed a $10 million seed funding round, led by a16z crypto, with participation from BoxGroup and Sunflower Capital. Angel investors, including Circle co-founder Sean Neville and former Microsoft executive Charlie Songhurst, also contributed.

The Better Money Company aims to create a stablecoin clearinghouse, offering clients low-cost services for exchanging various dollar-pegged tokens. Broner, who spent over two years at a16z crypto focusing on stablecoin investments, and Zuckerman, who previously worked at Latham & Watkins and served as general counsel at Eigen Labs, founded the company in November last year.

The company has secured commitments from issuers such as Paxos, Stripe's Bridge, and MoonPay, and plans to support all tokens compliant with the enacted Genius Act, excluding USDT. The U.S. version, USAT, remains unaffected. While the product is not yet publicly available, it is expected to be accessible to clients in the coming weeks.

data.title: Former A16Z crypto investor raises $10 million to establish stablecoin clearinghouse Better Money
data.description: Former a16z crypto investor Sam Broner announced the launch of The Better Money Company with his college friend Adam Zuckerman, raising $10 million in seed funding. The round was led by a16z crypto, with participation from BoxGroup and Sunflower Capital, and angel investors including Circle co-founder Sean Neville and former Microsoft executive Charlie Songhurst. The company aims to establish a stablecoin clearinghouse, providing customers with low-cost exchange services for various USD-pegged tokens. Broner previously worked at a16z crypto for over two years, focusing on stablecoin investments. Zuckerman previously worked at Latham & Watkins and later served as general counsel for Eigen Labs. The two founded the company last November and have already secured commitments from several issuers, including Paxos, Stripe's Bridge, and MoonPay. The company plans to support all tokens compliant with the signed and effective Genius Act, excluding USDT (its US version, USAT, is unaffected). The product is not yet publicly available but is expected to be available to customers in the coming weeks.

data.title: US Defense Secretary Herbert: (Regarding the Strait of Hormuz) The world should prepare for escalation.
data.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Hergsays: (Regarding the Strait of Hormuz) The world should prepare for an escalation. (Jinshi)

data.title: King Charles III to Visit U.S. Amid Tensions Between Trump and Starmer
data.description: King Charles III is set to embark on a state visit to the United States in late April, coinciding with heightened tensions between U.S. President Donald Trump and UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer. Bloomberg posted on X that the announcement of the visit came shortly after President Trump reiterated his criticisms of the United Kingdom. The timing of the visit underscores the strained relations between the two leaders, as diplomatic engagements continue amidst political discord.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Kazakhstan's Gold Reserves Rise to 11.17 Million Ounces in February
data.description: Kazakhstan's gold reserves increased to 11.17 million ounces in February, according to Jin10. This marks a significant rise in the country's precious metal holdings, reflecting strategic efforts to bolster economic stability through asset diversification. The increase in gold reserves is part of Kazakhstan's broader economic strategy to enhance financial security amid global market fluctuations. The move aligns with similar actions by other nations seeking to strengthen their economic resilience through precious metal investments.

data.title: U.S. Military Targets Iranian Mine-Laying Capabilities
data.description: The U.S. military is focusing on Iran's mine-laying capabilities, according to BlockBeats. On March 31, U.S. Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Kane, announced that the first B-52 bombers have commenced land-based missions aimed at addressing this threat.

data.title: Bitcoin developers are developing quantum-resistant Bitcoin improvement proposals and have already deployed testnets.
data.description: Bitcoin Magazine published an article on the X platform stating that developers are currently working on a Bitcoin improvement proposal to enhance Bitcoin's ability to resist quantum attacks, and the relevant testnet has been deployed.

data.title: Illinois Senator Proposes Bill for Public Funds Investment in Bitcoin
data.description: Illinois State Senator Steve McClure has introduced Bill SB3672, known as the Local Government Digital Asset Investment Act, which aims to amend the state's Public Funds Investment Act to allow public institutions to allocate up to 5% of public funds into Bitcoin-related financial products. According to ChainCatcher, the bill defines eligible 'digital asset stocks' as equity in publicly traded companies that, according to their latest audited financial statements, hold at least 25% of their total assets in Bitcoin or other digital currencies. This threshold includes companies like Strategy, Twenty One Capital, Metaplanet, and Semler Scientific, which focus on Bitcoin accumulation as a core strategy. The bill also permits public funds to invest in Bitcoin ETFs and Bitcoin bonds, with additional transparency requirements.

data.title: Binance Futures to Transition EDGEUSDT Contract to Standard USDⓈ-M
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the EDGEUSDT perpetual contract on Binance Futures will undergo a transition to a standard USDⓈ-M EDGEUSDT Perpetual Contract on 2026-03-31 at 12:30 (UTC). This process is expected to take up to three hours, depending on price volatility and the availability of a stable index price. During this transition, trading functions will remain operational, and open orders and positions will not be canceled.

The transition involves converting pre-market perpetual futures contracts to standard perpetual futures contracts once a stable index price is established from the spot market, as determined by Binance. The mark price will gradually shift from the pre-market trading mark price to the standard mark price calculation, which is defined as the median of Price 1, Price 2, and the Contract Price. A price cap of ±1% will be enforced on the mark price, limiting price changes within a ±1% range every second during both the pre-market trading and transition periods.

Once the pre-market perpetual futures contract concludes, the mark price will be calculated using the formula: Mark Price = Median (Price 1, Price 2, Contract Price). For further details on the formulas for Price 1 and Price 2, users are directed to the Mark Price and Price Index in USDⓈ-Margined Futures documentation. Additionally, after the pre-market trading ends, the premium index will be available, and the funding rate will adhere to the standard perpetual futures contract's funding rate rules, with maximum and minimum funding rates reaching up to +2.00% and -2.00%, respectively.

data.title: Expert / Analyst Quote Formula: Warren Buffett Questions Fed's Rate Cut Decision
data.description: Warren Buffett, the renowned investor, has expressed uncertainty about whether he would choose to lower interest rates if he were in the position of the Federal Reserve. According to Jin10, Buffett's comments come amid ongoing debates about the Fed's monetary policy and its impact on the economy. His remarks highlight the complexities and challenges faced by central banks in navigating economic conditions and making decisions that could influence market stability and growth.

data.title: Tether Dismisses Top Gold Traders Months After Recruitment from HSBC
data.description: Tether has reportedly terminated the employment of several top gold traders just months after hiring them from HSBC, according to BWEnews. The decision comes as part of a strategic shift within the company, which is known for its stablecoin operations. The traders were initially brought on board to enhance Tether's capabilities in the precious metals market, particularly gold trading. However, the company has now decided to part ways with these individuals, signaling a change in its approach to the gold trading sector. The move has raised questions about Tether's future strategies and its commitment to diversifying its trading operations beyond cryptocurrencies. The company has not provided specific reasons for the dismissals, leaving industry observers to speculate on the underlying factors influencing this decision. Tether's actions reflect the dynamic nature of the financial markets and the challenges faced by companies in adapting to evolving business environments.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Nvidia-Linked Debt Deal Boosts 30,000-Acre Data Center Investment
data.description: A significant debt deal connected to Nvidia is accelerating the development of a massive 30,000-acre data center project. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the financial maneuver that is expected to enhance the infrastructure supporting artificial intelligence and data processing capabilities. This strategic investment underscores the growing demand for advanced data centers, driven by the increasing reliance on AI technologies. The project aims to cater to the expanding needs of tech companies seeking robust data processing solutions. The involvement of Nvidia, a key player in the AI industry, further emphasizes the importance of this development in the tech landscape.

data.title: Berkshire Hathaway purchased $17 billion worth of Treasury bonds this week.
data.description: Warren Buffett stated that Berkshire Hathaway will use its cash reserves should the market experience a significant downturn. He also mentioned that Berkshire purchased $17 billion worth of Treasury bonds this week.

data.title: NVIDIA Invests $2 Billion in Marvell Technology Group, Shares Surge
data.description: Marvell Technology Group (MRVL.O) saw its shares rise over 11% in pre-market trading following a significant investment from NVIDIA. According to Jin10, NVIDIA has committed $2 billion to Marvell, signaling a strong vote of confidence in the company's future prospects. This investment is expected to bolster Marvell's position in the technology sector, potentially leading to further innovations and market expansion. The collaboration between these two tech giants is anticipated to have a substantial impact on the industry, as both companies continue to push the boundaries of technological advancement.

data.title: Interactive Brokers launches cryptocurrency trading in the European Economic Area, supporting 11 assets including BTC, ETH, and SOL.
data.description: Interactive Brokers (NASDAQ: IBKR) announced the expansion of its digital asset services to the European Economic Area (EEA) through an integration with Zero Hash. The service, offered by Interactive Brokers Ireland Limited, allows eligible individual investors in the region to trade cryptocurrencies. Currently supported trading assets include 11 cryptocurrencies: BTC, ETH, LTC, BCH, LINK, SOL, ADA, XRP, DOGE, AVAX, and SUI. Users can trade through platforms such as Trader Workstation, IBKR Desktop, Client Portal, IBKR Mobile, and IBKR GlobalTrader. The platform also continues to offer trading services for traditional financial products such as stocks, options, futures, forex, bonds, and mutual funds. In addition, Interactive Brokers already offers cryptocurrency trading services in the US through Interactive Brokers LLC and in the UK through Interactive Brokers (U.K.) Limited.

data.title: The US dollar index (DXY) fell to its intraday low, currently trading at 100.28.
data.description: The US dollar index (DXY) fell to an intraday low, currently trading at 100.28. (Jinshi)

data.title: Iran Conflict Impacts S&P 500 Amid Ongoing Bull Market
data.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran is causing significant disruptions in the S&P 500, despite not ending the three-year bull run in U.S. equities. Bloomberg posted on X that the tensions have introduced volatility into the market, affecting investor sentiment and leading to fluctuations in stock prices. Analysts are closely monitoring the situation as it unfolds, noting that geopolitical events such as this can have far-reaching implications for global markets. The S&P 500, a key indicator of U.S. stock market performance, is experiencing increased pressure as investors weigh the potential economic impacts of the conflict. Market experts suggest that while the bull market remains intact, the situation in Iran could lead to short-term instability and uncertainty for traders and investors alike.
